chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1500 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No.6863/2019 3. For order on CMA No.68632/2019 4. For hearing of main case 26.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, advocate for the petitioner Chaudhry Mehmood Anwar, advocate for respondent No.4 Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Per learned counsel, petitioner has passed away and the petition is abated. In view hereof, this petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
